THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOIKANYO, MANTSHA JACOBETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARABALLO, ANGELO CHING, FE $959.20 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,039.20, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT DAVID KIMBALL IS STAYED BY BANKRUPTCY.
